module.name: host
module.purpose: Host crate namespace for HostSession and host-side tool execution. The executor sends preview replies with host System metadata and tool previews, sends unknown-tool failure events, and HostSession imports reusable protocol contracts from marix-protocol while common provides config/channel helpers.

childModules.name: executor
childModules.purpose: Executor folder module owning tool preview and host-side tool execution; preview replies send System::new host metadata plus tool preview schema content, and failed tool lookups send ExecutionStatus failures.
